fixes.title: Move the lambda body to a top-level function that takes the captured 'old' value as a parameter, and call it from the contract before the lambda
Restructure the contract to not need per-element comparison against an 'old' value (e.g. capture the bound before the function call and pass it in as a parameter)
Known v0.4 limitation: cross-element invariants with 'old' inside lambdas are not expressible

message: 'old(...)' is not allowed inside a lambda body; 'old' is evaluated once at function entry, but lambda bodies are evaluated per element — the two time-frames do not align
